root_cause.summary: After GLOBAL, demand traffic is mostly inventory_only; rag_query_logs only written on rules RAG path; skip telemetry gated by RAG_RC11_TELEMETRY_ENABLED so rag_retrieval events stopped 2026-07-07 while conversation_events overall continued.
root_cause.fix: Always emit skip + retrieval_turn_classification (independent of RC11 flag for minimal emit); do not fake rag_query_logs for inventory-only turns.

pre.notes: Other conversation_events types remain active after Jul 8; only rag_retrieval / rag_query_logs went quiet.

config_candidates.note: CONFIG_CANDIDATE_PENDING_BASELINE — do not freeze thresholds until post deploy
